paragraphs.text: 电动汽车使用电池驱动，不排放尾气，对环境更加友好。
paragraphs.translation: This is an advanced article exploring important topics in modern science and society.

paragraphs.text: 随着电池技术的发展，电动汽车的续航里程越来越长。
paragraphs.translation: Reading and understanding this content will help develop your Chinese reading skills.

paragraphs.text: 越来越多的国家和汽车公司正在转向电动化。
paragraphs.translation: Think critically about the ideas presented and form your own opinions.
